evals.prompt: On a Drupal site, what does the yaml_editor module do, and which JavaScript code editor library does it load over the enhanced textareas?
With the yaml_editor module, how do you make a specific textarea in a Drupal admin form get the YAML editor? Name the HTML attribute, and note any route restriction.
Which config object does yaml_editor use for its settings, and what are its two keys?
On this live site, which Ace editor theme is the yaml_editor module currently configured to use? Answer with the exact theme id.
On this live site, at what admin path is the yaml_editor settings form, and what permission controls access to it? Inspect the running site to answer.
This site should load the Ace editor from a self-hosted copy instead of the cdnjs CDN. Configure the yaml_editor module so its editor source is the local path /libraries/ace/ace.min.js.

The Article content type has a plain-long-text field named field_yaml_config. Make its edit form use the YAML editor: switch that field's widget on the Article default form display to the yaml_editor module's 'Text area with YAML editor' widget.
